creator: neldredge@math.ucsd.edu
text:
On Mon, 9 Jul 2007, Martin Wilke wrote:

> Synopsis: net-p2p/azureus build failure
>
> State-Changed-From-To: feedback->closed
> State-Changed-By: miwi
> State-Changed-When: Mon Jul 9 15:25:21 UTC 2007
> State-Changed-Why:
> should fixed. so can we close this pr.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=113983

Sorry I didn't respond before, I was away.  It is NOT fixed, the same 
error occurs.  In fact I don't think the azureus port has changed at all 
since I reported the bug on June 24.  My CVS header says

# $FreeBSD: ports/net-p2p/azureus/Makefile,v 1.43 2007/06/14 08:03:09 miwi Exp $

i.e. June 14, and cvsweb doesn't show any more recent changes.

-- 

Nate Eldredge
neldredge@math.ucsd.edu
